_doc: OPERATOR presentation overlay (FRCGW migration — ruled 2026-07-22). The emitter merges the machine engine (content+routing) with this overlay → engine.json (terminals schema). Bee-D never sets tier/severity. Dishes take heading from the menu label + result_copy from the grounded result_state unless overridden. Escapes REQUIRE heading+result_copy here; tier=67 FORCED on escapes.
_ruling: Flag 1 certificate-pending-at-settlement → tier 147/amber/critical (live deadline, 15% conditionally at stake — Execution Pack). Flag 2 unsure-tax-residency-status → 67/amber/standard (guidance dish, asserts no outcome). Other 6 rows + escape copy approved as drafted. Seeded from the live bespoke FrcgwClearanceCertificateCalculator.tsx (RATE 0.15, THRESHOLD 0; cert-provided→67/green, no-cert/foreign→147/red).

none_fit.heading: FRCGW may not apply to your situation
none_fit.result_copy: Your answers suggest Foreign Resident Capital Gains Withholding may not fit — for example you are not selling Australian real property, or your sale contract was signed before 1 January 2025 under the earlier threshold rules. If you are selling Australian property under a contract dated on or after 1 January 2025, a clearance certificate almost certainly applies — a short personalised review confirms whether it does and the exact steps to take before settlement.

insufficient_information.heading: Your situation needs a closer look
insufficient_information.result_copy: Your answers do not yet confirm your FRCGW position — a key detail (your tax residency, your settlement date, or whether you have already applied for the certificate) is unconfirmed. A short personalised review confirms where you stand and exactly what to lodge, and by when, before settlement.
